name: strncpy
title: strncpy
syntax: void strncpy(char dest[], char src[], long max);
description: This function copies src to dest. max indicates the size of dest in bytes. The function ensures that there is a terminating '\0'. Thus, a maximum of max-1 bytes are copied.

parameters.name: max
parameters.description: Is used to determine the maximum number of copied bytes.Must not be larger than the size of dest. A maximum of max-1 bytes are copied. If src is shorter than that, bytes are only copied until a terminating '\0' is encountered.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
